sigWerErrors.reason: The word '这' (this) is inserted, which changes the structure and meaning of the sentence.
Replacing '再' (again) with '样' (like/way) alters the intended meaning of repeating an action.
Replacing '一' (one) with '也' (also) changes the meaning and coherence of the sentence.
Replacing the Chinese word '姓' (surname) with the English word 'singing' is a major error and makes the sentence incoherent.
